DONE WAIT

?:   Serial command help
!:   Boot to mass storage
i:   Information
L:   Load binary file
v:   Get VDU data
V:   VDU Loop
S:   Save binary file
T:   Snapshot emulated memory
M:   Load monitor
B:   Load BASIC
C:   Load COS40
t:   Trace
u:   Dump trace
l:   List Files
a:   Dump RAM
w:   Dump memory window
z:   Enter parameter value
v:   Version
R:   Reset
@:   Load app1
r:   Display VDU Regs
0-9: Enter parameter digit

(Text Parameter:''
